business.headline: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson resigns, board begins search for successor: ReportThe leadership change had been in motion for some time. The search for a successor reportedly began earlier this year after Wilson indicated he did not wish to continue beyond his contract period. He had taken charge in September 2022, shortly after the airline returned to the Tata Group following privatisation.

DA hike delay: Is this normal or something to worry about?For many, a DA hike around this time is almost expected. But with no announcement yet, the delay is raising a simple question, i.e., is this normal, or is something different this time?

Nayara to shut Vadinar refinery from April 9; will fuel supply take a hit?The timing of this shutdown is important. Ongoing tensions in the Middle East, including the US-Iran conflict, have already tightened the availability of oil and gas globally. This has put pressure on imports of crude oil, natural gas and LPG into India.

The end of Inspector Raj: A reform that assumes too muchMoving beyond the Inspector Raj era marks a clear shift, but lasting success will depend on building systems where trust is supported by credible enforcement and consistent compliance on the ground.

Sensex jumps 787 points: 3 reasons why stock market took a U-turn and rose todayStock market rally: The biggest trigger for the recovery was news of a possible Iran-US ceasefire framework. This comes after a weak start to the day, where markets were under pressure due to global tensions.

RBI MPC begins under shadow of global conflict: What it means for your moneyThe RBI MPC meeting comes at a difficult moment, as global tensions and rising oil prices have made the central bank's job more complex. The repo rate currently stands at 5.25%.

Should Indian investors change their strategy amid global conflicts?Effective financial planning begins with clearly identifying long-term financial goals and aligning investments accordingly. Asset allocation should be determined based on the required rate of return and an individual's risk profile.

Explained: What's really behind the latest surge in crude oil pricesCrude oil is trading on uncertainty rather than fundamentals, and until clarity emerges on supply disruptions, prices are likely to remain volatile and highly sensitive to every geopolitical development.

Should married couples file taxes together in India? Here's what experts thinkIn many homes, income may vary between partners, but financial goals are common. With joint filing now being discussed, one question stands out, i.e., should married couples continue to be taxed separately? Let's have a look.
Trent shares jump nearly 7%: Why is the stock rallying today?Trent's stock is up nearly 7% to around Rs 3,792 in intraday trade, as investors reacted to the company's March quarter business update.

Senco Gold shares jump over 13%: What's driving the sharp rallySenco Gold's Q4 update has sparked this rally, but the real test lies ahead. Will demand stay resilient after weddings, or will high gold prices start weighing on momentum?

Gold dips under Rs 1.5 lakh: Is this the right time to buy or wait?Gold prices have slipped below the Rs 1.5 lakh mark, and that's got many investors thinking. Is this a good opportunity to step in, or is it better to wait and watch?

YEIDA opens bookings for 973 plots near Noida airport: All you need to knowThe Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority has launched bookings for 973 plots near Noida airport. As the region gears up for growth, here's everything you need to know before applying.

Why crude oil prices could stay high even after the West Asia war endsCrude oil prices have surged, supply remains tight, and infrastructure damage could take months to repair. Even if the war ends, the impact on global oil markets may linger longer.

Insurance claim rejection over hospital lapse ruled unfair by forum: ReportThe forum directed the insurance company to settle the mediclaim along with compensation and legal costs. The order was passed by the Vadodara District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission.
Markets open lower amid Iran conflict fears and rising oil pricesThe S&P BSE Sensex dropped 382.67 points to 72,936.88, while the NSE Nifty50 fell 84.90 points to 22,628.20 as of 9:29 am.

The global oil crisis is worsening. How badly is it being underestimated?Crude oil prices are rising, supply is tightening, and the West Asia war shows no sign of ending. So how much of this oil crisis is the world still underestimating?

entertainment.headline: Anushka Sharma calls Dhurandhar: The Revenge gripping, lauds cast Anushka Sharma reviews Dhurandhar: The Revenge, praising its scale and performances as the film crosses Rs 1000 crore in India. Read on to know her full reaction.

Akshay Kumar turns up in ragged outfit, says ghosts did it Akshay Kumar's unusual outfit at the Bhooth Bangla trailer launch grabbed attention, but there's more to the story behind the film's quirky promotion.

Dhurandhar 2 removes more abuses in new print after half-muted cuss words Dhurandhar 2 has made subtle changes to its theatrical prints after criticism over partially muted cuss words. The decision came even as the censor board had cleared the film with half-muted abuses.

Rakesh Bedi apologises for old remark, says didn't know word he used was banned Rakesh Bedi has apologised for using a banned word in an old remark about the Dalit community. He said he was unaware of its inappropriateness or the fact that it was banned.

Dhurandhar 2's Rs 1,000-crore India run and Bollywood's catch-up with Baahubali 2 Dhurandhar: The Revenge has made one clear achievement in 18 days -- setting a new legacy for Bollywood at the box office by emerging as the first Hindi film to cross the Rs 1,000-crore mark in India. It is not just about numbers anymore, it's about changing Bollywood's game.

Vignesh Shivan reacts to claims of being overshadowed by Nayanthara Vignesh Shivan opened up about being recognised as Nayanthara's husband, dismissed claims of being 'overshadowed,' and shared a heartfelt anecdote reflecting love over ego in their relationship.

Screen Awards 2026 full winners list: Dhurandhar dominates, Homebound is Best Film At the Screen Awards 2026, the spy thriller Dhurandhar dominated with 14 wins, including Best Director for Aditya Dhar and Best Actor for Ranveer Singh. Neeraj Ghaywan's Homebound was adjudged Best Film.

He noted that this information was previously unknown to Iranian forces, and its disclosure complicated the mission.

Very upset, they will pay big price: Trump after Iran rejects ceasefire proposalUS President Donald Trump warned Iran it would "pay a big price" after rejecting a US ceasefire proposal, setting a firm Tuesday deadline for a deal. While Iran pushed for a permanent end to the conflict with broader conditions, Trump signalled severe consequences if no agreement is reached.

An Arresting Personality: As Jayalalithaa Reigned and Raged | Part 41

Live: Hegseth warns of largest volume of strikes against Iran tonightUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump has escalated tensions with Iran, warning that "power plants and bridges" could be targeted if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened by Tuesday evening, saying "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one." Trump's abusive threat drew a sharp from Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who warned that Trump's "reckless moves" risk dragging the country into living hell and insisting "you won't gain anything through war crimes." Behind the scenes, Oman has held urgent talks with Iran to ensure smooth flow of transit through war-hit Hormuz, while Pakistan and Egypt have kept diplomatic channels open between Washington and Tehran. At the same time, violence has intensified elsewhere, with Israeli strikes in Beirut killing at least four people and Hezbollah launching retaliatory attacks, escalating the conflict further. Follow IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

Artemis 2 LIVE: Four astronauts will soon start observing the MoonNasa Artemis 2 Moon Mission LIVE: The four Artemis 2 astronauts have broken the record for the farthest human spaceflight. Follow this live blog for all updates on Artemis 2.

Iran rejects US ceasefire plan via Pakistan, sets 10 conditions to end warIran's reply is structured as a 10-clause framework that goes beyond an immediate ceasefire. It includes demands for an end to conflicts across the region, protocols to ensure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, the lifting of sanctions, and provisions for reconstruction.

The CJI ordered a written apology from top officials, calling it an administrative failure. The court noted hours of failed contact as judicial officers were held hostage, terming it evidence of bureaucratic chaos.

Impeachment motion to remove CEC Gyanesh Kumar rejected by both HousesThe impeachment motion seeking the removal of Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar has been rejected by both the Rajya Sabha Chairman and Lok Sabha Speaker after due consideration.

Delhi assembly security breach: Car rams barricade, drops bouquet, drives outA Tata Sierra with a Uttar Pradesh registration spent about five minutes inside the Assembly complex before exiting through Gate No. 2. While the bouquet left behind inside the Assembly Speaker's car was found to be harmless, authorities have since traced the vehicle and taken the driver into custody.

Indian-origin doctor in US to pay $14 million to settle medical fraud caseAn Indian-origin doctor and his facility have agreed to pay $14 million after being sued for performing unnecessary and overly complex procedures on patients. According to whistle-blowers, Dr Jitendra Patel carried out needless invasive treatments and manipulated data to defraud the US public insurance programme, Medicaid.

sports.headline: Mumbai Indians plays down Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hype, says Ravi Bishnoi no mystery RR vs MI, IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians play down Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's hype ahead of RR clash, with Paras Mhambrey saying there are no special plans, while also dismissing Ravi Bishnoi as a mystery threat.

The teenager from Odisha had just stunned the world number one to win gold in the World Archery Para Series in Bangkok.

Rahane justified his call to bat first, but not everyone was convinced by the decision.

R Ashwin explainsRavichandran Ashwin explains how Test retirement helped Virat Kohli improve his T20 strike rate with a new batting approach after the RCB vs CSK clash. KKR vs PBKS Highlights: Rain saves Kolkata's blushes as match called offKolkata (KKR) vs Punjab (PBKS) Highlights, IPL 2026: A batting blunder from Kolkata has been saved by rain as the match at the Eden Gardens against Punjab gets called off. Having won the toss, KKR opted to bat first in a bizarre call and were made to pay as they were reeling at 25 for 2 in 3.4 overs. Rain was relentless for a good portion of the night and despite relenting at the end, the match had to be called off. Both teams get one point each in the end.

Padikkal smashed a fifty in RCB's 43-run win over Chennai Super Kings on Sunday.

IPL 2026: Rashid Khan is developing a secret deliveryGujarat Titans spinner Rashid Khan is developing a secret delivery. Speaking to India Today, Rashid revealed that he has been forced to experiment due to the rapid evolution of batters in the last two years in the league.

With the star doubles duo injured, the spotlight shifts to Lakshya Sen and PV Sindhu to carry the nation's hopes and end a decades-long wait for a singles title.

Chinnaswamy pitch has changed, not possible to hit from Ball 1: PadikkalRCB vs CSK: It is not possible to hit from the first ball at Chinnaswamy, said RCB batter Devdutt Padikkal after the team's win against CSK. RCB started slow but eventually were able to hit 250 runs against Ruturaj Gaikwad's side.

Where is T20 World Cup hero Sanju Samson? CSK coach plays down rough startIPL: Chennai Super Kings star recruit Sanju Samson is still settling into the side, said Stephen Fleming after the team's third straight loss in the IPL's 2026 season. Samson has a horrid start so far in the tournament, failing in all three matches so far.

Shreyas Iyer will be India captain soon: Vijaykumar Vyshak backs PBKS skipperIPL 2026: Vijaykumar Vyshak threw his weight behind Shreyas Iyer as a future India captain, praising his leadership and ability to manage players at the Punjab Kings. Dinesh Karthik unpacks the method to Tim David's Bengaluru madnessRoyal Challengers Bengaluru batting coach Dinesh Karthik explained the approach behind Tim David's explosive finish that sealed a commanding win for RCB over Chennai Super Kings in their Indian Premier League 2026 clash on Sunday.

After 7th successive loss as CSK captain, Ruturaj Gaikwad takes the blameChennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad accepted full responsibility after his side suffered a heavy defeat against Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday, a result that extended his run to seven consecutive losses as captain.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".
